name: Onion-Mustard Rolls
recipeInstructions:
------------
1. In a medium bowl, combine the flour and salt; stir with a fork to mix.
2. Pour warm water and yeast into the dry ingredients; stir until just combined.
3. Mix in eggs, mayonnaise, Dijon mustard, and chopped onion until well incorporated.
4. Stir in parsley flakes.
5. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface; knead until smooth (about 8 minutes).
6. Shape the dough into a tight log and place it in a greased bowl.
7. Cover with a damp towel and let rise in a warm area for about 1 hour, or until doubled in size.
8. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Lightly grease a baking sheet.
9. Remove dough from the bowl; turn onto the prepared sheet.
10. Using a sharp knife, cut into 12 pieces and shape each piece into a roll.
11. Place rolls on the sheet about 2 inches apart.
12. Cover with the towel and let rise for an additional 15 minutes.
13. Bake until golden brown (about 20-25 minutes).
14. Remove from oven; turn off the heat and let cool completely before serving.
